label: Run
command: if [ -f stack.yaml ]; then stack run; elif [ -f cabal.project ] || ls *.cabal 2>/dev/null | grep -q .; then cabal run; else echo 'No Stack or Cabal found to run the code' >&2; exit 1; fi

label: Build
command: if [ -f stack.yaml ]; then stack build; elif [ -f cabal.project ] || ls *.cabal 2>/dev/null | grep -q .; then cabal build; else echo 'No Stack or Cabal found to build the code' >&2; exit 1; fi
